scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=terminal-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --packages=external && esbuild main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --packages=external
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "node dist/index.js"
